role_summary: the transaction advisory manager leads transaction advisory engagements and manages  teams supporting complex deals.
responsibilities: • lead financial due diligence  and advisory assignments   • manage transaction teams and timelines   • review valuation, diligence, and deal outputs   • advise clients on deal risks and structure   • coordinate with legal, tax, and regulatory advisors   • support senior leadership in transaction execution
qualifications: • ca with strong transaction advisory experience   • leadership and client management skills   • deep understanding of deal lifecycle       government & psu roles
